summary: Made two surgical seam edits: aligned the opening desk image with chapter 14's defense-folder handoff, and tightened the closing transition into chapter 16 by putting the blood-marked packet back in Leela's tote while keeping the phone unread.
edits: Changed the opening reference from "meeting folder" to "defense folder" to match the prior chapter's final image.
Adjusted the final action so Leela shoves the damp packet back into her tote without checking the phone, reinforcing the laundromat handoff in chapter 16.
